understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of KA59 is to win every level by simultaneously positioning all selectable pieces (marked P for selected and S for others) onto every goal tile marked + in the semantic grid, progressing through all levels until the entire game reports WIN.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement actions (MOVE_LEFT/RIGHT/UP/DOWN) shift the currently selected piece in pixel coordinates (3 pixels per cell), potentially pushing adjacent pushable blocks or being blocked by walls/objects; CLICK switches selection to another selectable piece at the exact target_position without moving it; multiple selectables require clicking between them to control each one separately, and all goals must be covered at once to win with finite steps per level.
